---
title: "Schedule"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: FALSE
    code-copy: true
    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: wrap
---

::: {.schedule-hero}
::: {.schedule-hero-copy}
Dates are placeholders for 2026. The course moves from sequence identification to raw reads, analysis workflows, interpretation, and final synthesis.
:::

::: {.schedule-rhythm aria-label="Weekly rhythm"}
::: {.rhythm-item}
<span class="rhythm-kicker">Tuesday</span>
<span class="rhythm-title">Questions due</span>
:::

::: {.rhythm-item}
<span class="rhythm-kicker">Friday</span>
<span class="rhythm-title">Assignment due</span>
:::

::: {.rhythm-item}
<span class="rhythm-kicker">Weekly</span>
<span class="rhythm-title">Project progress issue</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
## How to use this page

Start with the current week, open the lecture topic, then work through the question set, assignment, and project checkpoint. Questions and assignments live in the [**assignments repository**](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments) — clone it, work in your folder, and open a pull request ([how to turn in](turn-in.qmd)). Use [Skills](support.qmd) when an assignment asks for GitHub, Quarto, Raven, Hyak, containers, or archiving.
:::

::: {.schedule-grid}
::: {.schedule-card .schedule-card-feature}
<span class="week-label">Before class</span>

### Get set up

[Setup: your computer, Raven, Hyak](setup.qmd)

::: {.schedule-actions}
<span class="schedule-chip">Complete 3 tutorials</span>
<span class="schedule-chip">Open **Setup Check** issue</span>
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 00</span>

### Bioinformatics habits and data provenance

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
<span class="schedule-muted">none</span>

<span>Topic</span>
[Bioinformatics habits and data provenance](lectures/00-before.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Repository and data setup](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/00-bash)

<span>Project</span>
Establish repos
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 01</span>

### Sequence databases and BLAST

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 01](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week01.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Sequence databases and BLAST](lectures/01-start-up.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[NCBI BLAST](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/01-blast)

<span>Project</span>
Open **project-proposal** issue
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 02</span>

### Raw reads, FASTQ, QC, and trimming

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 02](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week02.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Raw reads, FASTQ, QC, and trimming](lectures/02-raw-reads-qc.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[FASTQ QC](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/02-fastq-qc)

<span>Project</span>
Explore project data, QC, add hashes
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 03</span>

### Mapping, assembly, and quantification

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 03](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week03.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Mapping, assembly, and quantification](lectures/03-mapping-quantification.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Mapping or quantification workflow](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/03-mapping-quantification)

<span>Project</span>
ID endpoint in README; start workflow
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 04</span>

### RNA-seq and differential expression

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 04](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week04.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[RNA-seq and differential expression](lectures/04-rna-seq-dge.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Differential gene expression](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/04-dge)

<span>Project</span>
Complete sliced workflow -> endpoint
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card .schedule-card-milestone}
<span class="week-label">Week 05</span>

### Genome annotation and genomic ranges

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 05](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week05.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Genome annotation and genomic ranges](lectures/05-annotation-ranges.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Annotation and ranges](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/05-annotation-ranges)

<span>Project</span>
**Mid-quarter project update**
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 06</span>

### Variants and population signals

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 06](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week06.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Variants and population signals](lectures/06-variants.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[VCF and variant summary](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/06-variants)

<span>Project</span>
README w/ results; 4-week plan; issues resolved
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 07</span>

### Epigenetics and DNA methylation

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 07](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week07.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Epigenetics and DNA methylation](lectures/07-methylation.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Methylation, motifs, IGV](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/07-methylation)

<span>Project</span>
Launch project report; all sections noted
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 08</span>

### eDNA and metabarcoding

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 08](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week08.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[eDNA and metabarcoding](lectures/edna.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[eDNA metabarcoding](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/08-edna-metabarcoding)

<span>Project</span>
Mock ultimate figure
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card}
<span class="week-label">Week 09</span>

### Project synthesis and biological interpretation

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 09](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week09.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Project synthesis and biological interpretation](lectures/09-synthesis.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Project synthesis](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/09-synthesis)

<span>Project</span>
Clear repo organization
:::
:::

::: {.schedule-card .schedule-card-milestone}
<span class="week-label">Week 10</span>

### Final compendium and presentations

::: {.schedule-links}
<span>Questions</span>
[Week 10](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/blob/main/questions/week10.md)

<span>Topic</span>
[Final compendium and presentations](lectures/10-lastmile.qmd)

<span>Assignment</span>
[Final release](https://github.com/sr320/fish546-2026-assignments/tree/main/assignments/10-compendium)

<span>Project</span>
**Compendium**
:::
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<img src="https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/w/course-fish546-2026/course-fish546-2026" alt="GitHub commit activity"/>
